## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the desired behavior.

## Why this matters

How does this improve team operations, traceability, or reliability?

## Scope

- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] UI change
- [ ] Backend/API change
- [ ] Runtime/agent flow change

## Additional context

Links, mocks, related issues.
